  • Method Details

    • getAllEvents

      public org.springframework.data.domain.Page<@NonNull EventDTO> getAllEvents(org.springframework.data.domain.Pageable pageable)
      Find every event. This method had to be redefined to manage pagination
      Parameters:
      pageable - used to manage pagination

    • getEventById

      public EventDTO getEventById(String id)
      Find an event given its id
      Parameters:
      id - event's id
      Returns:
      the event having the id's params or null if it doesn't exist

    • getEventsByTopic

      public org.springframework.data.domain.Page<@NonNull EventDTO> getEventsByTopic(List<String> topics, org.springframework.data.domain.Pageable pageable)
      Find events that contain at least one of the specified topics
      Parameters:
      topics - the list of topics
      pageable - used to manage
      Returns:
      Page conteing the events or a null value if nothing was found

    • getEventsByDate

      public org.springframework.data.domain.Page<@NonNull EventDTO> getEventsByDate(LocalDate startingDate, org.springframework.data.domain.Pageable pageable)
      Find events that start at the specified date or later
      Parameters:
      startingDate - the starting date of the event
      pageable - used to manage pagination
      Returns:
      Page conteing the events or a null value if nothing was found

    • getEventsByLocation

      public org.springframework.data.domain.Page<@NonNull EventDTO> getEventsByLocation(org.springframework.data.geo.Point location, org.springframework.data.geo.Distance distance, org.springframework.data.domain.Pageable pageable)
      Find events based on their location
      Parameters:
      location - the point where events have to be found
      distance - the max possible distance from location
      pageable - used to manage pagination

    • getEventsByTopicAndDate

      public org.springframework.data.domain.Page<@NonNull EventDTO> getEventsByTopicAndDate(List<String> categories, LocalDate date, org.springframework.data.domain.Pageable pageable)
      Find every event containing at least one of the specified topics and starting at the specified date or later
      Parameters:
      categories - the list of topics
      date - the minimum starting date of the events
      pageable - used to manage pagination

    • getEventsByCity

      public org.springframework.data.domain.Page<@NonNull EventDTO> getEventsByCity(String cityName, org.springframework.data.domain.Pageable pageable)
      Find all events in a specific city
      Parameters:
      cityName - The name of the specific city in which the events must be searched
      pageable - used to manage pagionation

    • updateEvent

      @Transactional public EventDTO updateEvent(String event_id, String username, EventDTO newEventDTO) throws IllegalAccessException
      Updates an Event's data

      This method:

      1. Checks if the Event exists.
      2. Checks if the Organizer who requested the Event update is the owner of the Event
      3. Checks for consistency: ??? can't be changed
      4. Updates the specific data for the Event
      5. Saves the updated Event to MongoDB.
      6. Updates the corresponding node in the Graph Database (Neo4j).

      Parameters:
      event_id - The id of the Event that will be updated.
      username - The username of the user who requested the update.
      newEventDTO - The EventDTO with the updated data.
      Returns:
      The updated EventDTO.
      Throws:
      RuntimeException - If the event is not found, if the user isn't the organizer of the event or if illegal fields are updated
      IllegalArgumentException - If the event doesn't exist
      IllegalAccessException - If the user hasn't got the authorization for modify this event

    • calculateStatistics

      @Transactional public StatisticsDTO calculateStatistics(String event_id, String id)
      This method calculates statistics of a specific event and stores them in it
      Parameters:
      event_id - The id of the event
      id - The id of the organizer of the event
      Returns:
      The StatisticsDTO containing the results
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - If the event or organizer are not found, or if the event was not created by the specific organizer

    • publishStatistics

      public EventDTO publishStatistics(String event_id, String id)
      This method marks the event's statistics as "publishable" by setting the specific flag = true.
      Parameters:
      event_id - The id of the event of which the statistics have to be published.
      id - The id of the organizer of the event.
      Returns:
      The EventDTO, containing the statistics.
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - If the event or organizer are not found, or if the event was not created by the specific organizer.

    • eventDemographic

      public List<HashMap<String,Object>> eventDemographic(String city, int year, String user_id)
      This method calculates the number of event per month over a given year, considering a specific city
      Parameters:
      city - The city where the events must be searched in.
      year - The year when the events are held.
      user_id - The id of the user who requested the data.
      Returns:
      The list of months and related count of events for each one of them.
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - If user not found or no events found in the specified city
